children.title: Fix straight pool leakage from BH side corners

comments.text: BH side corners were leaking due to capillary action from the side walls. Trying sealing the corners from the outside wiith sealant and seeing results.
comments.author: Shrijal

children.title: do RCA
children.notes:
- The bridge overflows only during h2o2 routine. When flush is kept on for a long time, the bridge is not able to sustain enough outflow and overflows after a period of time.
- Solved by putting a timer on the flush of 1 minute

children.title: Explore flux flip method
children.notes: flux flip method is overall not providing an advantage for the resolution we want. Also it is exhibiting drift in value when done with double 6mm diametric magnets stacked on top of each other.

children.title: Design 3 guide LS probing for angle measurement
Find options for incremental/absolute linear encoder
RCA of combined error in cutting from measurement and correction
children.notes:
The magnet encoder is behaving differently depending on the position and orientation of the magnet. This variance came out to be less than 0.02deg and even close to 0.01deg when swaraj removed the problematic magnet and replaced it. The same encoder is performing much better now.
To summarize:
1. Encoder repeatability is now 0.01deg
2. Clamping repeatability is close to 0.02deg
3. Block seek arm motion up and down added another 0.01deg to the repeatability.
In light of this, we are typing to nail down on why we were getting such bad results yesterday of 80micron delta is large block.
After just the magnet replacement, the blocks were now getting FFS in 15 sections (down from 20) but this was in the afternoon. After some more tuning Swaraj has brought it down to 5 sections. Deeper testing with more blocks pending.

children.notes:
- It was found that only during h2o2 routine, the cold water flow is so much that the bridge exit flow falls short.
- This leads to overflow of the bridge after a certain period.
